   179→    private fun executeTranscription(
   180→        transcriptionId: String,
   181→        videoPath: String,
   182→        videoName: String
   183→    ) {
   184→        currentTranscriptionId = transcriptionId
   185→        isRunning = true
   186→        currentVideoName = videoName
   187→        currentProgress = 0

   191→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   192→
   193→        val job = serviceScope.launch {
   194→            try {
   195→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   196→
   197→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   198→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   199→
   200→                // 检查 API Key
   201→                val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   202→                                 (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   203→
   204→                if (!hasGroqKey) {
   205→                    sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   206→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   207→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   208→                    stopSelf()
   209→                    return@launch
   210→                }
   211→
   212→                // 执行转录 - 使用用户指定的转录语言（如果设置了）
   213→                val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   214→                val result = ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   215→                    videoFile,
   216→                    config,
   217→                    transcribeLang,
   218→                    onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   219→                        updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   220→                        sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   221→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   222→                            segment, total, progress, message
   223→                        )
   224→                    }
   225→                )
   226→
   227→                // 转录完成
   228→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   229→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   230→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   231→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   232→
   233→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   234→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   235→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   236→                    }
   237→
   238→                    // 保存完成后立即停止服务
   239→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text, videoPath, vttPath)
   240→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   241→                        result.detectedLang,
   242→                        result.text
   243→                    )
   244→
   245→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   246→
   247→                    // 重置用户触发标志，服务将停止
   248→                    resetUserTrigger()
   249→
   250→                    // 移除已完成的任务
   251→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   252→                    if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   253→                        isRunning = false
   254→                        currentVideoName = null
   255→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   256→                        stopSelf()
   257→                    }
   258→
   259→                } else {
   260→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   261→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   262→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   263→
   264→                    // 出错后也重置用户触发标志
   265→                    resetUserTrigger()
   266→
   267→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)

   272→                        stopSelf()
   273→                    }
   274→                }
   275→
   276→            } catch (e: Exception) {

   287→                    stopSelf()

   289→            }

   294→    /**

   297→    private fun cancelTranscription() {
   298→        activeJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   299→        activeJobs.clear()
   300→        isRunning = false

   314→    /**
   315→     * 保存字幕文件
   316→     */
   317→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   318→        result: WhisperResult,
   319→        vttPath: String,
   320→        wtsPath: String
   321→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   322→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   323→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   324→
   325→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   326→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   327→            for (wt in result.words) {
   328→                curWords.add(wt)
   329→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   330→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   331→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   332→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   333→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   334→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   335→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   336→                }
   337→            }
   338→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   339→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   340→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   341→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   342→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   343→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   344→            }
   345→        }
   346→
   347→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   348→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   349→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   350→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   351→        }
   352→
   353→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   354→    }

   368→    private fun sendProgressBroadcast(segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String, remaining: Long) {
   369→        // 更新静态状态供页面恢复时查询
   370→        currentProgress = progress
   371→        currentMessage = message
   372→
   373→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_PROGRESS).apply {
   374→            putExtra(EXTRA_SEGMENT, segment)
   375→            putExtra(EXTRA_TOTAL, total)
   376→            putExtra(EXTRA_PROGRESS, progress)
   377→            putExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE, message)
   378→            putExtra(EXTRA_REMAINING, remaining)
   379→        }
   380→        sendBroadcast(intent)

   383→    private fun sendCompletedBroadcast(success: Boolean, detectedLang: String, text: String, videoPath: String? = null, vttPath: String? = null) {
   384→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   385→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, success)
   386→            putExtra(EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG, detectedLang)
   387→            // 计算字幕数量（粗略估计：按句子分割）
   388→            val subtitleCount = text.split(Regex("[.!?。！？]")).filter { it.isNotBlank() }.size
   389→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT, subtitleCount)
   390→            videoPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH, it) }
   391→            vttPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VTT_PATH, it) }
   392→        }
   393→        sendBroadcast(intent)

   396→    private fun sendErrorBroadcast(error: String) {
   397→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {

   399→            putExtra(EXTRA_ERROR, error)
   400→        }

   422→    /**

   424→     */
   425→    private fun createProgressNotification(
   426→        videoName: String,
   427→        segment: Int,
   428→        total: Int,
   429→        message: String
   430→    ): Notification {
   431→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   432→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   433→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   434→        }
   435→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   436→            this, 0, openIntent,
   437→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   438→        )
   439→
   440→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   441→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   442→        }
   443→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   444→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   445→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   446→        )
   447→
   448→        val progressText = if (total > 1) {
   449→            "分段 $segment/$total ($message)"
   450→        } else {
   451→            message
   452→        }
   453→
   454→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   455→            .setContentTitle("正在转录: $videoName")
   456→            .setContentText(progressText)
   457→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   458→            .setOngoing(true)
   459→            .setAutoCancel(false)
   460→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   461→            .addAction(android.R.drawable.ic_menu_close_clear_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   462→            .setProgress(total, segment, false)
   463→            .build()
   464→    }

   478→
   479→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)

   482→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)

   491→        activeJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }

    14→/**
    15→ * 本地转录服务接口
    16→ *
    17→ * 支持的引擎：
    18→ * 1. **Sherpa-ONNX** - 推荐方案（离线、高性能、多语言）
    19→ * 2. **Whisper.cpp** - 高性能方案（需 NDK 编译）
    20→ * 3. **Android SpeechRecognizer** - 原生方案（免费，多语言）
    21→ *
    22→ * ## Sherpa-ONNX 集成方案（推荐）
    23→ *
    24→ * ### 优点
    25→ * - 专为移动端优化，性能好
    26→ * - 支持多种 Whisper 模型（tiny/base/small）
    27→ * - 完全离线，无需网络
    28→ * - 提供 Android AAR 包，集成简单
    29→ * - 支持实时转录和文件转录
    30→ *
    31→ * ### 集成步骤
    32→ * 1. 添加依赖到 build.gradle.kts：
    33→ *    ```kotlin
    34→ *    implementation("com.k2fsa.sherpa:onnx:1.10.0")
    35→ *    ```
    36→ *
    37→ * 2. 下载模型文件（选择一个）：
    38→ *    - tiny: 75MB (最快，准确率较低)
    39→ *    - base: 142MB (平衡)
    40→ *    - small: 466MB (最准确，较慢)
    41→ *    下载地址: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases
    42→ *
    43→ * 3. 将模型文件放到 assets/models/ 目录
    44→ *
    45→ * 4. 使用示例：
    46→ *    ```kotlin
    47→ *    val config = OfflineRecognizerConfig(
    48→ *        modelConfig = OfflineModelConfig(
    49→ *            whisper = OfflineWhisperModelConfig(
    50→ *                encoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-encoder.onnx",
    51→ *                decoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-decoder.onnx"
    52→ *            )
    53→ *        )
    54→ *    )
    55→ *    val recognizer = OfflineRecognizer(context, config)
    56→ *    val stream = recognizer.createStream()
    57→ *    stream.acceptWaveform(audioSamples, sampleRate)
    58→ *    recognizer.decode(stream)
    59→ *    val result = recognizer.getResult(stream)
    60→ *    ```
    61→ *
    62→ * ### 性能对比
    63→ * - tiny 模型：约 2-3x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要20-30秒）
    64→ * - base 模型：约 1-2x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要30-60秒）
    65→ * - small 模型：约 0.5-1x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要60-120秒）
    66→ *
    67→ * ### 内存占用
    68→ * - tiny: ~200MB
    69→ * - base: ~400MB
    70→ * - small: ~800MB
    71→ *
    72→ * ## Whisper.cpp 集成方案（高级）
    73→ *
    74→ * ### 优点
    75→ * - C++ 实现，性能最优
    76→ * - 支持量化模型，内存占用更小
    77→ *
    78→ * ### 缺点
    79→ * - 需要 NDK 编译
    80→ * - 集成复杂度高
    81→ * - 需要 JNI 桥接
    82→ *
    83→ * ### 集成步骤
    84→ * 1. 克隆 whisper.cpp: https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp
    85→ * 2. 使用 NDK 编译 Android 库
    86→ * 3. 创建 JNI 桥接层
    87→ * 4. 集成到项目
    88→ *
    89→ * ## 推荐方案
    90→ * 对于本项目，推荐使用 **Sherpa-ONNX**：
    91→ * - 集成简单（只需添加依赖和模型文件）
    92→ * - 性能足够好（tiny 模型可达 2-3x 实时速度）
    93→ * - 完全离线，保护隐私
    94→ * - 支持多语言
    95→ */

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     7→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     8→import okhttp3.*
     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    10→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import javax.inject.Inject
    15→import javax.inject.Singleton
    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（官方限制 25MB，设置安全值）
    38→    // 参考：https://console.groq.com/docs/speech-to-text
    39→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L
    40→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    41→
    42→    // 最大重试次数
    43→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    44→
    45→    /**
    46→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    47→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    48→     * 添加自动重试机制，包括 API 配额限制处理
    49→     */
    50→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    51→        // 自动重试逻辑
    52→        var lastError: Exception? = null
    53→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
    54→            if (attempt > 0) {
    55→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
    56→                kotlinx.coroutines.delay(2000L * attempt) // 递增延迟
    57→            }
    58→
    59→            val result = transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang)
    60→            if (result?.success == true) {
    61→                return result
    62→            }
    63→            lastError = Exception(result?.error ?: "Unknown error")
    64→        }
    65→
    66→        // 所有重试都失败
    67→        return WhisperResult(
    68→            success = false,
    69→            error = "❌ 转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）\n\n${lastError?.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
    70→        )
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    /**
    74→     * 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）
    75→     * 从错误消息中提取需要等待的时间（秒）
    76→     */
    77→    fun isRateLimitError(errorMsg: String): Pair<Boolean, Int> {
    78→        val rateLimitPattern = Regex("Please try again in (\\d+)s")
    79→        val match = rateLimitPattern.find(errorMsg)
    80→        return if (match != null) {
    81→            val seconds = match.groupValues[1].toIntOrNull() ?: 0
    82→            Pair(true, seconds)
    83→        } else {
    84→            Pair(false, 0)
    85→        }
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 内部转录实现
    90→     */
    91→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    92→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    93→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    94→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    95→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    96→
    97→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    98→
    99→        // 检查文件大小
   100→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
   101→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
   102→
   103→        // 检查最小文件大小
   104→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
   105→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
   106→            return WhisperResult(
   107→                success = false,
   108→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
   109→            )
   110→        }
   111→
   112→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
   113→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   114→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: 25 MB)")
   115→            return WhisperResult(
   116→                success = false,
   117→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: 25 MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 应用会自动分段处理大文件\n2. 如果仍然失败，请使用较短的视频\n3. 或在设置中切换到其他 AI 提供商"
   118→            )
   119→        }
   120→
   121→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   122→
   123→        // 根据语言设置合适的 prompt，引导 Whisper 更准确地识别
   124→        val prompt = when (lang) {
   125→            "en" -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   126→            "ja" -> "正確に句読点を付けて書き起こしてください。"
   127→            "ko" -> "정확하게 구두점을 포함하여 전사하세요."
   128→            "ru" -> "Транскрибируйте точно с правильной пунктуацией."
   129→            "th" -> "ถอดความอย่างถูกต้องพร้อมเครื่องหมายวรรคตอนที่เหมาะสม"
   130→            "vi" -> "Phiên âm chính xác với dấu câu đúng."
   131→            "ms" -> "Transkripsi dengan tepat dan tanda baca yang betul."
   132→            "id" -> "Transkripsikan dengan akurat dan tanda baca yang benar."
   133→            "ar" -> "انسخ بدقة مع علامات الترقيم الصحيحة."
   134→            "pt" -> "Transcreva com precisão e pontuação correta."
   135→            "es" -> "Transcribe con precisión y puntuación correcta."
   136→            "fr" -> "Transcrire avec précision et ponctuation correcte."
   137→            "de" -> "Transkribieren Sie genau mit korrekter Zeichensetzung."
   138→            "hi" -> "सटीक विराम चिह्नों के साथ सही ढंग से लिप्यंतरण करें।"
   139→            "zh" -> "准确转录，使用正确的标点符号。"
   140→            else -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   141→        }
   142→
   143→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   144→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   145→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   146→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   147→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   148→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   149→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   150→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", prompt)
   151→
   152→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   153→
   154→        val request = Request.Builder()
   155→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   156→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   157→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   158→            .build()
   159→
   160→        return try {
   161→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   162→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   163→
   164→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   165→
   166→            if (response.code != 200) {
   167→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   168→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   169→
   170→                // 解析错误信息
   171→                val errorMsg = try {
   172→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   173→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   174→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   175→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   176→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   177→
   178→                    when {
   179→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   180→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   181→                        response.code == 401 ->
   182→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"
   183→                        errMsg?.contains("quota", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   184→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   185→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   186→                        response.code == 429 ->
   187→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   188→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   189→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   190→                        response.code == 403 ->
   191→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   192→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   193→                    }
   194→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   195→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   196→                }
   197→
   198→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   199→            }
   200→
   201→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   202→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   203→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   204→
   205→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   206→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   207→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   208→                return WhisperResult(
   209→                    success = false,
   210→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   211→                )
   212→            }
   213→
   214→            try {
   215→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   216→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   217→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   218→
   219→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   220→
   221→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   222→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   223→                    WordTimestamp(
   224→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   225→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   226→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   227→                    )
   228→                } ?: emptyList()
   229→
   230→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   231→
   232→                WhisperResult(
   233→                    success = true,
   234→                    text = text,
   235→                    words = words,
   236→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   237→                )
   238→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   239→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   240→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   241→                WhisperResult(
   242→                    success = false,
   243→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   244→                )
   245→            }
   246→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   247→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   248→            val errorMsg = when {
   249→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   250→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   251→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   252→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   253→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   254→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   255→            }
   256→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   257→        }
   258→    }
   259→}

    33→/**
    34→ * FFmpeg 分段转录服务 - 使用 FFmpeg Kit 处理大视频文件
    35→ *
    36→ * 增强功能：
    37→ * - 支持取消：检查协程状态，随时响应取消请求
    38→ * - 智能分段：基于静音检测和文件大小的自适应分段
    39→ * - 重试机制：每个段失败后自动重试
    40→ * - 超时控制：防止段处理卡死
    41→ * - 剩余时间估算：实时显示预计完成时间
    42→ * - 内存优化：流式处理大文件，不一次性加载
    43→ *
    44→ * 参考 GitHub 项目：
    45→ * - WritingMinds/ffmpeg-kit: Android FFmpeg 支持
    46→ * - gvk7/Whisper-Ffmpeg-Multi-Segment: 多段 Whisper 转录
    47→ * - wendy7756/AI-Video-Transcriber: 20分钟分段策略
    48→ */
    49→@Singleton
    50→class FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    51→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
    52→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    53→) {
    54→    companion object {
    55→        private const val TAG = "FFmpegSegmentTrans"
    56→        // Groq API 文件大小限制（调整为安全值）
    57→        private const val MAX_API_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L // 25MB（Groq 实际限制）
    58→        // 音频段目标大小（留出安全余量）
    59→        private const val TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024L // 20MB
    60→        // 分段转录的时长阈值（秒）- 超过此时长使用分段转录
    61→        private const val SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD = 180.0 // 3分钟（降低阈值）
    62→        // 最小分段时长（秒）- 避免分段太小
    63→        private const val MIN_SEGMENT_DURATION = 60L // 1分钟
    64→        // 分段时长（秒）- 增加到5分钟减少总段数
    65→        private const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 300L // 5分钟（原180秒）
    66→        // 段间重叠时间（秒）- 减少重叠提高速度
    67→        private const val OVERLAP_DURATION = 2L // 2秒（原3秒）
    68→        // 临时文件目录
    69→        private const val TEMP_DIR = "transcription_temp"
    70→        // 最大重试次数 - 减少重试次数加快失败响应
    71→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 2 // 2次（原3次）
    72→        // 重试延迟（毫秒）- 指数退避
    73→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS = 1000L
    74→        // 段提取超时（秒）
    75→        private const val EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 300L  // 5分钟超时
    76→        // 段转录超时（秒）- 根据段长度动态计算
    77→        private const val TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN = 120L // 每分钟音频最多2分钟
    78→        // 总转录超时（秒）- 防止卡死
    79→        private const val TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 3600L // 60分钟超时
    80→        // 并行处理数量 - 增加到4个并行转录加快速度
    81→        private const val PARALLEL_SEGMENTS = 4 // 4个（原2个）
    82→        // API请求间隔（毫秒）- 减少间隔加快速度
    83→        private const val API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS = 500L // 500ms（原800ms）
    84→        // 进度更新频率（段数）
    85→        private const val PROGRESS_UPDATE_INTERVAL = 1
    86→    }

   111→    enum class SegmentStatus {
   112→        PENDING,       // 等待处理
   113→        EXTRACTING,    // 提取音频中
   114→        EXTRACTED,     // 音频提取完成
   115→        TRANSCRIBING,  // 转录中

   117→        FAILED,        // 失败

   121→    /**
   122→     * 分段转录视频
   123→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   124→     * @param config AI配置
   125→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   126→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   127→     */
   128→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   129→        videoFile: File,
   130→        config: AIConfig,
   131→        lang: String? = null,
   132→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   133→    ): WhisperResult? = withTimeout(TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   134→        try {
   135→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   136→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   137→
   138→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   139→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   140→
   141→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   142→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   143→
   144→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   145→            val duration = try {
   146→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   147→                when {
   148→                    durationStr == null -> null
   149→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   150→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   151→                    else -> {
   152→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   153→                        null
   154→                    }
   155→                }
   156→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   157→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   158→                null
   159→            }
   160→
   161→            if (duration == null) {
   162→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   163→                return@withTimeout WhisperResult(
   164→                    success = false,
   165→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   166→                )
   167→            }
   168→
   169→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   170→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   171→
   172→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   173→            return@withTimeout when {
   174→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   175→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   176→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   177→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   178→
   179→                    // 先压缩音频
   180→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   181→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   182→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   183→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   184→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   185→                    } else {
   186→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   187→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   188→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   189→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   190→                        compressedFile.delete()
   191→                        result
   192→                    }
   193→                }
   194→                else -> {
   195→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   196→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   197→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   198→                    } else {
   199→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   200→                    }
   201→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   202→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   203→                }
   204→            }
   205→
   206→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   207→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   208→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   209→            WhisperResult(
   210→                success = false,
   211→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   212→            )
   213→        }
   214→    }

   216→    /**
   217→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（支持取消、详细进度跟踪）
   218→     */
   219→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   220→        videoFile: File,
   221→        config: AIConfig,
   222→        duration: Double,
   223→        lang: String?,
   224→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   225→    ): WhisperResult? = coroutineScope {
   226→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting internal segmented transcription, duration: ${duration}s")
   227→        // 检查取消
   228→        ensureActive()
   229→
   230→        // 计算分段数量，传入文件大小以优化分段策略
   231→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length())
   232→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   233→
   234→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   235→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   236→
   237→        // 分段状态跟踪
   238→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   239→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   240→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   241→        }
   242→
   243→        // 创建临时目录
   244→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   245→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   246→
   247→        // 时间跟踪
   248→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   249→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   250→
   251→        return@coroutineScope try {
   252→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   253→            var failedSegments = 0
   254→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   255→
   256→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   257→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   258→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   259→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   260→                // 检查取消
   261→                ensureActive()
   262→
   263→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   264→
   265→                // 更新状态
   266→                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   267→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   268→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   269→
   270→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   271→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   272→                }
   273→
   274→                // 检查取消（在超时后）
   275→                ensureActive()
   276→
   277→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   278→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   279→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "音频已提取")
   280→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted successfully")
   281→                } else {
   282→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   283→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   284→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   285→                    failedSegments++
   286→                }
   287→
   288→                // 更新状态
   289→                updateProgressWithStates(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + ((index + 1) * 20 / totalSegments),
   290→                    "提取完成 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   291→            }
   292→
   293→            // 检查取消（提取完成后）
   294→            ensureActive()
   295→
   296→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   297→            updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "开始转录...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   298→
   299→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   300→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   301→            // 使用 semaphore 控制并发数
   302→            val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   303→
   304→            // 语言检测：如果用户未指定语言，先转录第一段检测语言，再传给后续分段
   305→            var effectiveLang = lang
   306→            if (effectiveLang == null && segments.isNotEmpty() && segmentFiles[0] != null) {
   307→                val firstSegment = segments[0]
   308→                val firstFile = segmentFiles[0]!!
   309→                segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "检测语言中...")
   310→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "检测语言中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   311→
   312→                val firstTimeout = (firstSegment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   313→                val firstResult = try {
   314→                    withTimeout(firstTimeout) {
   315→                        transcribeSegmentWithRetry(firstFile, config, 0, firstSegment.duration, null)
   316→                    }
   317→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   318→                    Log.e(TAG, "First segment transcription failed for language detection", e)
   319→                    null
   320→                }
   321→
   322→                if (firstResult?.success == true && firstResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
   323→                    // 将语言名称转换为代码（如 "English" -> "en"）
   324→                    effectiveLang = LANG_NAME_TO_CODE[firstResult.detectedLang.lowercase()]
   325→                        ?: firstResult.detectedLang.lowercase().take(2)
   326→                    Log.d(TAG, "Detected language from first segment: ${firstResult.detectedLang} -> $effectiveLang")
   327→
   328→                    // 处理第一段结果
   329→                    val adjustedWords = firstResult.words.map { wt ->
   330→                        wt.copy(s = wt.s + firstSegment.startTime, e = wt.e + firstSegment.startTime)
   331→                    }
   332→                    allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   333→                    completedIndices.add(0)
   334→                    successSegments.add(0)
   335→                    firstFile.delete()
   336→
   337→                    val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   338→                    segmentTimes[0] = transcriptionTime
   339→                    segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${firstResult.words.size} 词, 语言: $effectiveLang)")
   340→                    updateProgressWithStates(1, totalSegments, 40 + (50 / totalSegments),
   341→                        "检测到语言: $effectiveLang, 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   342→                } else {
   343→                    Log.w(TAG, "Could not detect language from first segment, proceeding with auto-detect")
   344→                }
   345→            }
   346→
   347→            // 确定需要转录的分段（跳过已处理的第一段）
   348→            val remainingIndices = segments.indices.filter { !completedIndices.contains(it) }
   349→
   350→            // 检查取消（第一段处理完成后）
   351→            ensureActive()
   352→
   353→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理剩余分段
   354→            val results = coroutineScope {
   355→                val transcriptionJobs = remainingIndices.map { index ->
   356→                    val segment = segments[index]
   357→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   358→                        // 使用 semaphore 限制并发数
   359→                        semaphore.withPermit {
   360→                            // 检查取消
   361→                            ensureActive()
   362→
   363→                            if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   364→                                Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   365→                                return@async null
   366→                            }
   367→
   368→                            val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   369→                            val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   370→
   371→                            // 更新状态为转录中
   372→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   373→                            updateProgressWithStates(completedIndices.size, totalSegments, 40,
   374→                                "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   375→
   376→                            // 计算本段转录超时时间
   377→                            val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   378→
   379→                            // 转录该段（使用检测到的语言或用户指定的语言）
   380→                            val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   381→                                transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, effectiveLang)
   382→                            }
   383→
   384→                            // 检查取消
   385→                            ensureActive()
   386→
   387→                            val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   388→                            segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   389→
   390→                            if (result?.success == true) {
   391→                                // 调整时间戳
   392→                                val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   393→                                    wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   394→                                }
   395→
   396→                                // 线程安全地添加结果
   397→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   398→                                    // 去除重叠部分
   399→                                    if (index > 0) {
   400→                                        val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   401→                                        val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   402→                                        allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   403→                                    } else {
   404→                                        allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   405→                                    }
   406→                                    completedIndices.add(index)
   407→                                    successSegments.add(index)
   408→                                }
   409→
   410→                                // 删除临时段文件
   411→                                segmentFile.delete()
   412→
   413→                                // 更新状态为完成
   414→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   415→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   416→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   417→                                    val progress = 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments)
   418→                                    val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   419→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   420→                                        "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   421→                                }
   422→
   423→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   424→                                result
   425→                            } else {
   426→                                Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   427→                                failedSegments++
   428→
   429→                                // 更新状态为失败
   430→                                val errorBrief = if (result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true) "API Key错误"
   431→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("quota") == true) "配额用尽"
   432→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("network") == true) "网络错误"
   433→                                    else "转录失败"
   434→
   435→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   436→
   437→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   438→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   439→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   440→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 失败: $errorBrief", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   441→                                }
   442→
   443→                                null
   444→                            }
   445→                        }
   446→                    }
   447→                }
   448→
   449→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   450→                try {
   451→                    transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   452→                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   453→                    Log.d(TAG, "Transcription cancelled by user")
   454→                    throw e
   455→                }
   456→            }
   457→
   458→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   459→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   460→
   461→            // 清理临时目录
   462→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   463→
   464→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   465→                // 所有分段都失败了 - 提供详细的失败原因
   466→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   467→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   468→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   469→                    .joinToString("\n")
   470→
   471→                WhisperResult(
   472→                    success = false,
   473→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   474→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   475→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   476→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   477→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   478→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   479→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   480→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   481→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   482→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   483→                )
   484→            } else {
   485→                // 部分或全部成功
   486→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   487→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   488→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   489→
   490→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   491→
   492→                val resultMessage = if (failedSegments > 0) {
   493→                    "转录完成（部分失败）\n\n成功: ${successSegments.size}/$totalSegments\n失败: $failedSegments"
   494→                } else {
   495→                    "转录完成！\n\n成功: $totalSegments/$totalSegments 段"
   496→                }
   497→
   498→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   499→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   500→
   501→                WhisperResult(
   502→                    success = true,
   503→                    text = fullText,
   504→                    words = allWords,
   505→                    detectedLang = ""
   506→                )
   507→            }
   508→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   509→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   510→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   511→            WhisperResult(
   512→                success = false,
   513→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   514→            )
   515→        }
   516→    }

   519→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）

   521→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   522→        currentSegment: Int,
   523→        totalSegments: Int,
   524→        percent: Int,

   529→    ) {

   533→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   534→
   535→        val statusSummary = when {

   537→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"

   539→        }
   540→
   541→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   542→    }

   544→    /**
   545→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   546→     */
   547→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   548→        inputFile: File,
   549→        outputFile: File,
   550→        startTime: Double,
   551→        duration: Double,
   552→        segmentIndex: Int
   553→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   554→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   555→
   556→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   557→            if (attempt > 0) {
   558→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   559→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   560→            }
   561→
   562→            try {
   563→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   564→                if (success) return@withContext true
   565→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   566→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   567→                lastError = e
   568→            }
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   572→        false
   573→    }
   574→
   575→    /**
   576→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制，包括速率限制处理
   577→     */
   578→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   579→        segmentFile: File,
   580→        config: AIConfig,
   581→        segmentIndex: Int,
   582→        segmentDuration: Double,
   583→        lang: String?
   584→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   585→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   586→
   587→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   588→            if (attempt > 0) {
   589→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   590→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   591→            }
   592→
   593→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   594→            if (result?.success == true) {
   595→                // 成功后添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   596→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   597→                return@withContext result
   598→            }
   599→
   600→            // 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）
   601→            if (result?.error?.contains("Rate limit", ignoreCase = true) == true) {
   602→                val isRateLimit = whisperService.isRateLimitError(result.error)
   603→                if (isRateLimit.first && isRateLimit.second > 0) {
   604→                    Log.w(TAG, "Rate limit detected, waiting ${isRateLimit.second}s")
   605→                    delay(isRateLimit.second * 1000L)
   606→                    return@repeat // 跳过重试，等待后继续
   607→                }
   608→            }
   609→
   610→            // 重试前添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   611→            if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1) {
   612→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   613→            }
   614→            lastResult = result
   615→        }
   616→
   617→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   618→        lastResult
   619→    }

   621→    /**
   622→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   623→     */
   624→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   625→        currentIndex: Int,
   626→        totalSegments: Int,
   627→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   628→        overallStartTime: Long
   629→    ): Long {
   630→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   631→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   632→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   633→        }
   634→
   635→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   636→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   637→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   638→
   639→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   640→    }

   642→    /**
   643→     * 格式化时间显示
   644→     */
   645→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   646→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   647→        return when {
   648→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   649→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   650→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   651→        }
   652→    }

   654→    /**
   655→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段（优化版）
   656→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   657→     * 2. 动态调整分段大小以最小化总段数
   658→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   659→     */
   660→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   661→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   662→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   663→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   664→        } else {
   665→            128.0
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   669→        // 使用压缩后的比特率估算（24kbps）而不是原始比特率
   670→        val compressedBitrate = 24.0 // kbps（我们的压缩目标）
   671→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / (compressedBitrate * 1000.0))
   672→            .coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   673→
   674→        // 不低于 3 分钟（增加最小分段时长减少总段数）
   675→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0) // 3分钟
   676→
   677→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, originalBitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, compressedBitrate=${compressedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   678→
   679→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   680→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   681→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   682→        }
   683→
   684→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   685→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   686→        var currentStart = 0.0
   687→        var index = 0
   688→
   689→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   690→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   691→
   692→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   693→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   694→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   695→                break
   696→            }
   697→
   698→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   699→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   700→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   701→
   702→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   703→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   704→            index++
   705→        }
   706→
   707→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   708→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   709→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   710→        }
   711→
   712→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments (optimized for speed)")
   713→        return segments
   714→    }

   716→    /**
   717→     * 提取音频段 - 重新编码确保兼容性
   718→     * 修复：使用 AAC 编码而非 stream copy，解决某些格式不兼容问题
   719→     */
   720→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   721→        inputFile: File,
   722→        outputFile: File,
   723→        startTime: Double,
   724→        duration: Double
   725→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   726→        try {
   727→            // 确保输出目录存在
   728→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   729→
   730→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 AAC 编码确保兼容性
   731→            // 使用 -ss 在 -i 之前可以加速定位（input seeking）
   732→            val commandStr = buildString {
   733→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   734→                append("-ss $startTime ")  // 定位到开始时间
   735→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   736→                append("-t $duration ")  // 持续时间
   737→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   738→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码（兼容性好）
   739→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率（更低但足够语音识别，原32k）
   740→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   741→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐）
   742→                append("-compression_level 0 ")  // 最快压缩速度
   743→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   744→            }
   745→
   746→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   747→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   748→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   749→
   750→            // 使用同步执行
   751→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   752→
   753→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   754→            val output = session.output
   755→
   756→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   757→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   758→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   759→            }
   760→
   761→            // 检查输出文件（降低最小文件大小阈值，因为压缩后文件会更小）
   762→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 512
   763→
   764→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   765→            success
   766→
   767→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   768→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   769→            false
   770→        }
   771→    }
   772→
   773→    /**
   774→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   775→     * 优化参数：使用更高效的压缩设置
   776→     */
   777→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   778→        try {
   779→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.m4a")
   780→
   781→            // 优化压缩参数：
   782→            // - 24kbps 比特率：更低但足够清晰（原32k）
   783→            // - 16kHz 采样率：Whisper 推荐的最小值
   784→            // - 单声道：减少数据量
   785→            // - 最快压缩速度：减少处理时间
   786→            val commandStr = buildString {
   787→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   788→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   789→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   790→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   791→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率（平衡质量和大小，原32k）
   792→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   793→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐）
   794→                append("-compression_level 0 ")  // 最快压缩速度
   795→                append("-map_metadata -1 ")  // 移除元数据减小文件
   796→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   797→            }
   798→
   799→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   800→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   801→
   802→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   803→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists() && tempFile.length() > 512
   804→
   805→            if (success) {
   806→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes (from ${videoFile.length()} bytes)")
   807→                tempFile
   808→            } else {
   809→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}, file exists: ${tempFile.exists()}, size: ${tempFile.length()}")
   810→                tempFile.delete()
   811→                null
   812→            }
   813→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   814→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   815→            null
   816→        }
   817→    }
   818→
   819→    /**
   820→     * 获取视频信息
   821→     */
   822→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   823→        return try {
   824→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   825→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   826→
   827→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   828→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe state: ${session.state}")
   829→
   830→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {
   831→                val info = session.mediaInformation
   832→                Log.d(TAG, "MediaInfo - Duration: ${info?.getDuration()}")
   833→                info
   834→            } else {
   835→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe failed with code ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   836→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   837→                null
   838→            }
   839→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   840→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting media info", e)
   841→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   842→            null
   843→        }
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    /**
   847→     * 从单词构建句子
   848→     */
   849→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   850→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   851→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   852→
   853→        words.forEach { wt ->
   854→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   855→
   856→            // 检查句子结束
   857→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   858→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   859→                currentSentence.clear()
   860→            }
   861→        }
   862→
   863→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   864→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   865→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   866→        }
   867→
   868→        return sentences
   869→    }
   870→}
   871→
   872→/**
   873→ * 音频分段数据类
   874→ */
   875→data class AudioSegment(
   876→    val index: Int,
   877→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   878→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   879→)

    89→    fun loadSubtitles(videoPath: String, subtitlePath: String?) {
    90→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
    91→            // Try loading VTT subtitle

    93→            if (vttPath != null) {
    94→                val file = File(vttPath)
    95→                if (file.exists()) {
    96→                    val content = file.readText()
    97→                    val subs = VttParser.parse(content)
    98→                    if (subs.isNotEmpty()) {
    99→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(
   100→                            subtitles = subs,

   102→                            isTranscribing = false  // 确保有字幕时不显示转录状态
   103→                        )}
   104→                        // Load word timestamps if available
   105→                        loadWordTimestamps(vttPath)
   106→                        return@launch
   107→                    }
   108→                }
   109→            }
   110→            // 只有在没有字幕时才显示提示，不自动触发转录
   111→            _uiState.update { it.copy(
   112→                statusText = "无字幕文件\n\n点击「开始转录」按钮生成字幕",
   113→                isTranscribing = false

   118→    private fun findExistingSubtitle(videoPath: String): String? {
   119→        val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   120→        for (ext in listOf(".vtt", ".srt")) {
   121→            val f = File(base + ext)
   122→            if (f.exists()) return f.absolutePath
   123→        }
   124→        // Check with language suffix
   125→        val dir = File(videoPath).parentFile ?: return null
   126→        val name = File(videoPath).nameWithoutExtension
   127→        dir.listFiles()?.forEach { f ->
   128→            if (f.name.startsWith(name) && f.extension == "vtt") return f.absolutePath
   129→        }
   130→        return null
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    private fun loadWordTimestamps(vttPath: String) {
   134→        val wtsPath = vttPath.replace(Regex("\\.vtt$"), ".wordts.json")
   135→        val wtsFile = File(wtsPath)
   136→        if (wtsFile.exists()) {
   137→            try {
   138→                val timings: List<WordTimestamp> = json.decodeFromString(wtsFile.readText())
   139→                _uiState.update { it.copy(wordTimings = timings) }
   140→            } catch (_: Exception) {}
   141→        }
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    /** Called every 30ms from the player to sync subtitles */
   145→    fun updatePosition(positionMs: Long) {
   146→        _uiState.update { it.copy(currentPositionMs = positionMs) }
   147→        val subs = _uiState.value.subtitles
   148→        if (subs.isEmpty()) return
   149→
   150→        // Binary search for current cue (ported from renderer.js)
   151→        var lo = 0; var hi = subs.size - 1; var idx = -1
   152→        while (lo <= hi) {
   153→            val mid = (lo + hi) ushr 1
   154→            when {
   155→                positionMs < subs[mid].startMs -> hi = mid - 1
   156→                positionMs > subs[mid].endMs -> lo = mid + 1
   157→                else -> { idx = mid; break }
   158→            }
   159→        }
   160→        // Gap handling: find next cue within 0.5s
   161→        if (idx < 0) {
   162→            for (i in subs.indices) {
   163→                if (subs[i].startMs > positionMs) {
   164→                    idx = if (subs[i].startMs - positionMs < 500) i else if (i > 0) i - 1 else 0
   165→                    break
   166→                }
   167→            }
   168→            if (idx < 0) idx = subs.size - 1
   169→        }
   170→
   171→        if (idx != _uiState.value.currentCueIndex) {
   172→            _uiState.update { it.copy(
   173→                currentCueIndex = idx,
   174→                currentSentence = subs[idx].text,
   175→                showWordCard = false,
   176→                aiAnalysisResult = null
   177→            )}
   178→        }
   179→    }

   199→        )}

   623→     */
   624→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   625→        currentIndex: Int,
   626→        totalSegments: Int,
   627→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   628→        overallStartTime: Long
   629→    ): Long {
   630→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   631→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   632→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   633→        }
   634→
   635→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   636→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   637→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   638→
   639→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   640→    }

   642→    /**
   643→     * 格式化时间显示
   644→     */
   645→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   646→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   647→        return when {
   648→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   649→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   650→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   651→        }
   652→    }
   653→
   654→    /**
   655→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段（优化版）
   656→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   657→     * 2. 动态调整分段大小以最小化总段数
   658→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   659→     */
   660→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   661→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   662→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   663→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   664→        } else {
   665→            128.0
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   669→        // 使用压缩后的比特率估算（24kbps）而不是原始比特率
   670→        val compressedBitrate = 24.0 // kbps（我们的压缩目标）
   671→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / (compressedBitrate * 1000.0))
   672→            .coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   673→
   674→        // 不低于 3 分钟（增加最小分段时长减少总段数）
   675→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0) // 3分钟
   676→
   677→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, originalBitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, compressedBitrate=${compressedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   678→
   679→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   680→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   681→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   682→        }
   683→
   684→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   685→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   686→        var currentStart = 0.0
   687→        var index = 0
   688→
   689→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   690→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   691→
   692→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   693→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   694→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   695→                break
   696→            }
   697→
   698→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   699→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   700→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   701→
   702→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   703→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   704→            index++
   705→        }
   706→
   707→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   708→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   709→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   710→        }
   711→
   712→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments (optimized for speed)")
   713→        return segments
   714→    }

```kotlin
private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long): List<AudioSegment> {

}
```

## 四、音频压缩和预处理逻辑

### 音频段提取 (第720-770行)

```kotlin
private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
    inputFile: File,
    outputFile: File,
    startTime: Double,
    duration: Double
): Boolean {
    val commandStr = buildString {
        append("-hide_banner -y ")
        append("-ss $startTime ")        // 快速定位
        append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
        append("-t $duration ")          // 持续时间
        append("-vn ")                   // 移除视频
        append("-acodec aac ")           // AAC 编码
        append("-b:a 24k ")              // 24kbps 比特率 ⭐
        append("-ac 1 ")                 // 单声道 ⭐
        append("-ar 16000 ")             // 16kHz 采样率 ⭐
        append("-compression_level 0 ")  // 最快压缩
        append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
    }
    
    val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
    // 检查成功：返回码=0 且 文件>512字节
}
```

```kotlin
        append("-vn ")                   // 移除视频
        append("-acodec aac ")           // AAC 编码
        append("-b:a 24k ")              // 24kbps 比特率 ⭐
        append("-ac 1 ")                 // 单声道 ⭐
        append("-ar 16000 ")             // 16kHz 采样率 ⭐
        append("-compression_level 0 ")  // 最快压缩
        append("-map_metadata -1 ")      // 移除元数据
        append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
    }
    // ...
}
```

**压缩参数说明：**
- **比特率 24kbps**：极低但足够语音识别（原32k）
- **采样率 16kHz**：Whisper 推荐的最小值
- **单声道**：减少50%数据量
- **AAC 编码**：兼容性好，压缩效率高
- **压缩级别 0**：最快速度，牺牲一点压缩率

### WhisperService 核心实现 (WhisperService.kt)

**OkHttp 客户端配置 (第28-33行)**
```kotlin
private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 连接超时15秒
```

**API 调用 (第86-258行)**
```kotlin
private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(
    audioFile: File,
    config: AIConfig,
    lang: String?
): WhisperResult? {
    // 1. 文件大小检查 (第88-107行)
    if (audioFile.length() > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
        return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "文件超过25MB限制")
    }
    
    // 2. API Key 获取 (第109-122行)
    val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.ifBlank { 
        if (config.provider == "groq") config.apiKey else ""
    }
    
    // 3. 构建 Multipart 请求 (第124-158行)
    val requestBody = MultipartBody.Builder()
        .setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
        .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, 
            audioFile.asRequestBody("audio/*".toMediaType()))
        .addFormDataPart("model", config.whisperModel)  // whisper-large-v3-turbo
        .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
        .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
        .apply {
            if (!lang.isNullOrBlank()) {
                addFormDataPart("language", lang)
            }
        }
        .build()
    
    // 4. 发送请求 (第160-177行)
    val request = Request.Builder()
        .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
        .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
        .post(requestBody)
        .build()
    
    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    
    // 5. 解析响应 (第179-245行)
    // 提取 text, words (WordTimestamp), detectedLang
}
```

**重试机制 (第50-71行)**
```kotlin
suspend fun transcribeGroq(...): WhisperResult? {
    var lastError: Exception? = null
    repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->  // 最多3次
        if (attempt > 0) {
            delay(2000L * attempt)  // 递增延迟：2s, 4s, 6s
        }
        
        val result = transcribeGroqInternal(...)
        if (result?.success == true) {
            return result
        }
        lastError = Exception(result?.error)
    }
    
    return WhisperResult(success = false, 
        error = "转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）")
}
```

**速率限制处理 (第77-85行，第600-608行)**
```kotlin
// 检测 429 错误并提取等待时间
fun isRateLimitError(errorMsg: String): Pair<Boolean, Int> {
    val rateLimitPattern = Regex("Please try again in (\\d+)s")
    val match = rateLimitPattern.find(errorMsg)
    return if (match != null) {
        Pair(true, match.groupValues[1].toInt())
    } else {
        Pair(false, 0)
    }
}

// 在重试逻辑中使用
if (result?.error?.contains("Rate limit") == true) {
    val (isRateLimit, waitSeconds) = whisperService.isRateLimitError(result.error)
    if (isRateLimit && waitSeconds > 0) {
        delay(waitSeconds * 1000L)  // 等待指定时间
    }
}
```
